title: Cleretum oculatum
taxonomy: Cleretum oculatum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Aizoaceae, commonly known as the ice plant or succulent family. This plant belongs to the genus Cleretum, which consists of several species found in southern Africa. Cleretum oculatum is native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. It is a succulent plant with striking blue flowers that bloom in the winter months. As a member of the Aizoaceae family, Cleretum oculatum has adapted to survive in arid environments with minimal water availability.
